title: With His Latest Threats, Trump Signals to Iran That He Is Willing to Escalate
summary_full: President Trump is facing a critical moment in the war, which has failed to bring about the “unconditional surrender” he once demanded.
summary_public: President Trump is facing a critical moment in the war, which has failed to bring about the “unconditional surrender” he once demanded.
